trades.reasoning: Down -6.4% from avg cost of $14.89 with bearish MACD and price below SMA-20 — proactively exiting before the -7% auto stop-loss triggers to preserve capital for redeployment
Score 95 with RSI 61.3 in the ideal bullish momentum zone, confirmed MACD crossover, and price 6.5% above SMA-20 — clean setup with room to run
Score 95 with rising MACD histogram and RSI 66.9 — strong momentum alignment at an affordable price with SMA-20 acting as support below
Score 95 with all three bullish signals confirmed and RSI 67.5 still below overbought — solid momentum entry before it approaches the 70 threshold

decisions.briefing: Market data is unavailable today so all decisions rest on technicals. NOK has drifted to -6.4% below avg cost with bearish MACD and a price well below its 20-day average — close enough to the -7% stop-loss that selling now captures slightly better execution than waiting for the auto-trigger. Proceeds combined with existing cash open up three slots for score-95 momentum names with RSI readings in the sweet spot between 60 and 69.

market_education.summary_en: No market direction data was available today, so the screener's technical signals drove all decisions. The top candidates continue to cluster in the RSI 60–69 range — the zone where momentum is confirmed but stocks aren't yet overbought. Portfolio focus shifted to pruning a deteriorating position in NOK and rotating that capital into three high-scoring setups with aligned MACD, RSI, and SMA-20 signals.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場方向數據無法獲取，所有決策均依賴技術指標。篩選器中表現最佳的候選股RSI集中於60至69之間，此區間代表動能已獲確認但尚未進入超買狀態。投資組合操作重心在於削減持續走弱的諾基亞（NOK）部位，將資金輪換至三檔MACD、RSI及20日均線訊號全面一致的高評分個股。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A stop-loss is a pre-set exit price that automatically sells a position once losses reach a defined threshold — here, -7% from average cost. NOK hit -6.4% today with no recovery signals in sight, making proactive selling the smarter move. Exiting just before the stop fires gives slightly better execution and frees capital faster for redeployment into stronger setups.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 止損是一個預設的出場價位，當虧損達到設定幅度時自動平倉，本組合的門檻為成本價下跌7%。NOK今日已虧損6.4%且技術面毫無好轉跡象，主動出清優於被動等待系統觸發止損。提前出場不僅可獲得略佳的成交價格，也能更快將資金釋放，部署至更具動能的標的。
